channel.title: troubleshoot on LTL
channel.description: Recent content in troubleshoot on LTL

item.title: Github Clone Ssl Connection Error Centos6
item.description: Issue git clone SSL connect error (NSS error -12190) git fatal: HTTP request failed git clone https://github.com/vim/vim.git Initialized empty Git repository in /root/vim/.git/ error: while accessing https://github.com/vim/vim.git/info/refs fatal: HTTP request failed git fatl: unable to access : SSL connect error GIT_CURL_VERBOSE=1 git clone https://github.com/fshilver/settings.git Cloning into 'settings'... * Couldn't find host github.com in the .netrc file; using defaults * About to connect() to github.com port 443 (#0) * Trying 192.

item.title: Svn Ssl Error Centos6
item.description: Issue svn command SSL error with https svn server svn list https://10.10.10.10/svn/blurblur svn: OPTIONS of 'https://10.10.10.10/svn/blurblur': SSL handshake failed: SSL error: Key usage violation in certificate has been detected. (https://10.10.10.10) Environment CentOS 6.4 Solution change the neon package’s compile option, rebuild and re-install set the repository to download source rpm vi /etc/yum.repo.d/source-rpm.repo [base-source] name=CentOS-6.4 - Base source baseurl=http://vault.centos.org/6.4/os/Source/ gpgcheck=1 gpgkey=http://vault.centos.org//RPM-GPG-KEY-CentOS-6 priority=1 enabled=1 [updates-source] name=CentOS-6.
